channel.title: Mamp on adoption curve dot net
channel.description: Recent content in Mamp on adoption curve dot net

item.title: Getting OpenOffice to talk to MAMP and MySQL
item.description: For reasons that are too dull to go into, I needed to convert from a Dbase database to a MySQL database. OpenOffice can read both types, which means that you can create a new MySQL database, open the DBF version and then drag the records across. The prerequisite to this is being able to get OpenOffice to connect to the MySQL database. There are instructions here, and tucked away at the bottom is a note about forcing MySQL to use TCP/IP rather than sockets.
